summary: High‑quality soundboard capture of a standout 1991 show, praised for its sweet and beautiful performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about the recording, describing it as "sweet" and "beautiful" and even calling the Oct 27, 1991 concert one of the best of that tour. No technical complaints are mentioned, suggesting a clean soundboard source, while the enthusiastic language indicates an especially enjoyable performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Two uniformly positive reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) highlight both excellent show vibe and good recording quality, leading to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific issues noted; reviewers describe the sound as sweet and beautiful, implying clear, well‑balanced audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers cite the concert as one of the best of the ’91 tour, indicating a consistently strong performance throughout.
